title: Affect Battery RunResult
description: JSON Schema for a single experiment run result (one row in the output dataset). Every experiment run MUST produce a file conforming to this schema per spec Requirement: Result JSON schema.

config.description: Full experiment configuration: model_name, condition, experiment_type, seed, temperature, num_conditioning_turns, num_transfer_questions, etc.

run_number.description: Zero-based index of this run within the batch.

conditioning_responses.description: Model responses during the conditioning phase, one per turn. Empty for NO_CONDITIONING.

conditioning_correct.description: Per-turn booleans: whether the model's arithmetic answer was correct. Length matches conditioning_responses.

transfer_responses.description: Model responses during the transfer phase, one per transfer question.

transfer_questions.description: Questions asked during the transfer phase. Same length as transfer_responses and transfer_expected.

transfer_expected.description: Expected answers for transfer questions. Empty string for creative/open-ended tasks.

start_time.description: Epoch seconds at start of run.

end_time.description: Epoch seconds at end of run. Must be >= start_time.

checksum.description: SHA-256 prefix (first 16 hex chars) of the serialized result, excluding the checksum field itself. Verified on load.
